title: Completing CEFR onboarding unlocks the dashboard
description: This test verifies that a signed-in learner can complete onboarding and land on the protected dashboard with their level set.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /onboarding
Complete the CEFR onboarding flow with a valid level selection and submit it
Verify the dashboard is displayed
Verify the learner level is reflected on the dashboard

title: Register and continue into onboarding
description: A new learner can create an account and is taken to the CEFR onboarding flow to begin setup.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the registration form
Verify the CEFR onboarding flow is displayed

title: Protected route redirects signed-out visitors to login
description: This test verifies that a signed-out visitor is sent to login when opening a protected page and can continue after signing in.

steps.description: Navigate to /cards
Verify the login page is displayed
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the cards page is displayed

title: Login and reach the dashboard
description: A returning learner can sign in and land on the protected dashboard with their learning overview visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the dashboard is displayed
Verify streak progress, daily quest status, and vocabulary summary are displayed

title: Protected practice page preserves the intended destination after login
description: This test verifies that a signed-out visitor returning from login lands on the protected practice page they originally tried to open.

steps.description: Navigate to /practice
Verify the login page is displayed
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the practice page is displayed

title: Complete CEFR onboarding and enter the app
description: An authenticated learner can answer the onboarding questions, submit their level test, and continue to the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /onboarding
Answer the vocabulary questions
Submit the level test
Verify a CEFR level result is displayed
Verify the dashboard is displayed

title: Redirect a signed-out visitor to login from a protected page
description: This verifies that a signed-out visitor who opens a protected route is sent to login instead of the protected content.

steps.description: Navigate to /cards
Verify the login page is displayed
Verify protected card content is not displayed

title: Login returns a learner to the dashboard
description: This test verifies that an authenticated learner can sign in and land on the main dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the dashboard is displayed
Verify dashboard summary content is displayed

title: Resume a protected route after signing in
description: A signed-out visitor attempting to open a protected page is redirected to sign in and returns to the original destination after login.

steps.description: Navigate to /cards
Verify the login page is displayed
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the vocabulary cards page is displayed

title: Protected profile page redirects signed-out visitors to login
description: This test verifies that a signed-out visitor is redirected to login when opening the profile page and can continue after signing in.

steps.description: Navigate to /profile
Verify the login page is displayed
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the profile page is displayed

title: Return to the dashboard after signing in from a protected page
description: A learner who signs in from a guarded route is taken back to the app and can continue without losing their place.

steps.description: Navigate to /practice
Verify the login page is displayed
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the AI writing challenge page is displayed

title: Registering a new learner begins onboarding
description: This test verifies that a new account registration routes the learner into CEFR onboarding instead of the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill in the email field with a valid new email address
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Submit the registration form
Verify the onboarding page is displayed

title: Authenticated session remains available after returning to the app
description: This test verifies that a learner who has already signed in can revisit a protected route and stay on the protected experience without being sent back to login.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /cards
Verify the cards page is displayed

title: Create a new vocabulary card
description: This verifies that an authenticated learner can add a new personal card and see it appear in their list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the vocabulary cards section link
Open the add card form
Fill in the original word field with a new unique word
Fill in the translation field with a valid translation
Select a valid direction value
Submit the add card form
Verify the new card appears in the card list

title: Review AI feedback after submitting writing practice
description: This verifies that an authenticated learner can submit a writing challenge and receive AI-generated feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the practice page link
Fill in the writing text area with a short response using the target words
Fill in the target words field with valid words
Submit the writing challenge
Verify AI feedback is displayed
Verify grammar or usage corrections are displayed

title: Review dashboard learning overview
description: An authenticated learner can open the dashboard and see the current streak, daily quest status, and vocabulary summary.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the dashboard is displayed
Verify streak progress, daily quest status, and vocabulary summary are displayed

title: View the vocabulary cards list and summary
description: This verifies that an authenticated learner can open their cards page and see their vocabulary summary and card list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the vocabulary cards section link
Verify vocabulary summary information is displayed
Verify the card list is displayed

title: Search for a vocabulary card by keyword
description: This verifies that an authenticated learner can search their cards and see the list update to matching results.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the vocabulary cards section link
Fill in the search field with a keyword that matches an existing card
Verify the card list is filtered to matching results

title: Filter vocabulary cards by status
description: This verifies that an authenticated learner can filter their cards by status and see only cards in the selected status.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the vocabulary cards section link
Select a card status filter value
Verify the card list reflects the selected status filter

title: Show invalid login feedback
description: A learner entering incorrect credentials receives a visible sign-in error and stays blocked from access.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with invalid@example.com
Fill in the password field with invalid-password
Submit the login form
Verify a login error is visible
Verify the dashboard is not displayed

title: Filter vocabulary cards by due date
description: This verifies that an authenticated learner can filter cards by due date and see the list update accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the vocabulary cards section link
Select the due date filter value for today
Verify the card list reflects the selected due date filter

title: Open the dashboard after onboarding progress updates
description: A learner who completes onboarding can return to the dashboard and see the learning overview update for the account.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /onboarding
Answer the vocabulary questions
Submit the level test
Click the link to return to the dashboard
Verify the dashboard is displayed
Verify the learning overview is displayed

title: View profile information
description: This verifies that an authenticated learner can open the profile page and review account-related information.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the profile page link
Verify profile information is displayed

title: View the profile page
description: An authenticated learner can open the profile page and see their account information area.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the profile navigation link
Verify the profile page is displayed
Verify account information is displayed

title: See validation when adding an incomplete card
description: This verifies that an authenticated learner cannot submit an incomplete card and sees validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the vocabulary cards section link
Open the add card form
Submit the add card form without filling required fields
Verify validation feedback is displayed

title: See validation when submitting practice without required input
description: This verifies that an authenticated learner sees validation feedback when the writing challenge is submitted incomplete.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the practice page link
Submit the writing challenge without filling required fields
Verify validation feedback is displayed
